howItWorks.intro: This deck board calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How many deck boards do I need?
faq.a: Divide deck area by board width, then add 10% for waste and cuts.
Wood costs less upfront but requires maintenance. Composite lasts 25-50 years maintenance-free.
